content: Phase 1: All POC tests passed (PostgreSQL, Storage, Gemini, Grading, Timer)
Phase 2: Backend - Auth, Evaluations, Questions, AI, Attempts, Uploads
Phase 2: Frontend - Login, Dashboard, Eval Management, Question Bank, Student Portal, Live Exam, Leaderboard
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with testing agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
Phase 3: Polish UX, fix edge cases, improve question authoring flow
